tweet.text: RT @TDefensiveLine: Chris and Martha were the keynote speakers for the sold out 2024 Florida Behavioral Health Conference. Thank you to the…

Check out @tdefensiveline first-ever virtual auction, Goal Line Giving! Support our mission to end youth suicide by bidding on exclusive items and unforgettable experiences.
Don’t miss out—bidding ends September 9th! Check it out here: (https://t.co/RC2M3pae1j) #GoalLineGiving
